overall.description: First-person exploration through a futuristic industrial district in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring massive overhead pipe networks, smokestacks, yellow crane structures, and narrow graffiti-covered alleyways with debris and abandoned structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a wide industrial thoroughfare into a claustrophobic, graffiti-strewn alleyway. It begins by moving along a broad road beneath massive overhead pipe networks and distant smokestacks, passing a parked silver sedan as it approaches a holographic billboard. As the camera turns right onto a concrete sidewalk, the perspective shifts to follow a massive yellow crane structure toward the EWAC industrial building. The scene then turns left into a loading area, passing a large armored truck before narrowing into a tight passage cluttered with trash bags and debris. Finally, the camera pushes through the enclosed alleyway past a rusted water tower and graffiti-covered walls, ending at a small shipping container building with a futuristic skyscraper looming in the distant background.
